basicDetails.schemeName: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to MSEs for Shed Developed by Private Developer

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The scheme &quot;Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana&quot; is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat. It aims to empower the state&#39;s dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, this initiative supports SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthens MSMEs, making them globally competitive.
The component &quot;Assistance to MSEs for Shed Developed by Private Developer&quot; provides SC/ST entrepreneurs for acquiring industrial sheds in mini estates developed by private developers. It encourages industrial growth by offering support for land, building, and infrastructure costs.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Financial Assistance:** Private developers receive an additional 15% assistance on the total cost of the shed.  - **Government Support:** SC/ST entrepreneurs need to pay only 30% of the shed price, after which possession is handed over, and developers can claim assistance.  - **Subsidized Costs:** The government disburses 35% of the shed cost after the sale and the remaining amount after production begins.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: - Trading activity will not be eligible under the scheme.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

children.text: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat. It aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, this initiative supports SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthens MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

The component "Assistance to MSEs for Shed Developed by Private Developer" provides SC/ST entrepreneurs for acquiring industrial sheds in mini estates developed by private developers. It encourages industrial growth by offering support for land, building, and infrastructure costs.
Private developers receive an additional 15% assistance on the total cost of the shed.
SC/ST entrepreneurs need to pay only 30% of the shed price, after which possession is handed over, and developers can claim assistance.
The government disburses 35% of the shed cost after the sale and the remaining amount after production begins.
Trading activity will not be eligible under the scheme.
portal. Click on "New Investor Registration" to access the registration form.
Fill in the Registration Form. Click on "Submit".
Verify the E-mail ID using the link sent on your registered E-mail ID.
After verification, you will be registered successfully.
Enter the email address and password you used during registration.
Click the "Login" button to access your account.
Now fill in the required details and mandatory documents about your business to complete the application process.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:** **Step-1:** Visit the [Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/) portal. Click on "New Investor Registration" to access the registration form. **Step-2:** Fill in the Registration Form. Click on "Submit". **Step-3:** Verify the E-mail ID using the link sent on your registered E-mail ID. **Step-4:** After verification, you will be registered successfully.
> **Post-Registration Process:** **Step-1:** Visit the [Investor Facilitation Portal (IFP)](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/) portal. Click on "Login". **Step-2:** Enter the email address and password you used during registration. **Step-3:** Click the "Login" button to access your account. **Step-4:** Now fill in the required details and mandatory documents about your business to complete the application process.
> **Helpdesk:** [**Contact** ](https://ifp.gujarat.gov.in/DIGIGOV/IFP-pages/contact.jsp?pagedisp=static)

schemeDefinitions.name: MSEs Industrial Unit

children.text: MSEs Industrial unit means Micro, and Small Enterprises as defined in the MSMED Act 2006 and subsequently amended from time to time.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: MSEs Industrial unit means Micro, and Small Enterprises as defined in the MSMED Act 2006 and subsequently amended from time to time.

schemeDefinitions.name: Private Developer

children.text: Private Developer means any Industries Association / any enterprise registered under the Societies Act, Partnership Act, Trust Act, Companies Act or SPV constituted for setting up of Mini Estate. Such entities shall be eligible to develop Mini Estate under this scheme.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: Private Developer means any Industries Association / any enterprise registered under the Societies Act, Partnership Act, Trust Act, Companies Act or SPV constituted for setting up of Mini Estate. Such entities shall be eligible to develop Mini Estate under this scheme.

schemeDefinitions.name: Mini Estate

children.text: Mini Estate means an industrial estate having area not more than two hectares and having constructed shed admeasuring of 50 8q.Mt to 100 Sq.Mt. each shed.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: Mini Estate means an industrial estate having area not more than two hectares and having constructed shed admeasuring of 50 8q.Mt to 100 Sq.Mt. each shed.

schemeDefinitions.name: Cost of Shed

children.text: Infrastructure Facilities mean minimum facilities required to be provided by the Private Developer to set up Mini Estate for MSEs mentioned below and as approved by SLEC.
Asphalt Road/ RCC Road/ Cement Concrete Road.
Domestic Sewerage Collection and Disposal System.
Water/ Gas/ Power Supply distribution network up to the shed.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md:
Infrastructure Facilities mean minimum facilities required to be provided by the Private Developer to set up Mini Estate for MSEs mentioned below and as approved by SLEC.

  - Asphalt Road/ RCC Road/ Cement Concrete Road. 
  - Storm Water Drainage System. 
  - Domestic Sewerage Collection and Disposal System. 
  - Streetlights.
  - Water/ Gas/ Power Supply distribution network up to the shed.
  - Steam/ Gas pipeline.
  - Connectivity for communication.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.
   1. The shed must be located in a government-approved mini estate.
   1. The entrepreneur must pay 30% of the shed cost to acquire possession.

&gt; **Note****:** 


  - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

children.text: The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.
The shed must be located in a government-approved mini estate.
The entrepreneur must pay 30% of the shed cost to acquire possession.
SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.
